description: anvilml-worker: respawn.rs RespawnPolicy with backoff and max-attempt guard
context: Create crates/anvilml-worker/src/respawn.rs: RespawnPolicy{delay_ms:u64,max_attempts:u32,window_s:u32}. pub fn should_respawn(&self,crash_count:u32,last_crash:Instant)->bool. pub fn next_delay_ms(&self,attempt:u32)->u64 (exponential backoff capped at 30s). Tests: max_attempts exceeded->false; within window->true; delay sequence correct. cargo test -p anvilml-worker --features mock-hardware -- respawn exits 0 >=4 tests.

description: anvilml-worker: managed.rs detect unexpected child exit and transition to Dead
context: Extend the continuous run() loop (P901-A1): add self.child.as_mut().unwrap().wait() as a third select! arm alongside event_rx.recv(). On unexpected exit: transition status to Dead; broadcast WorkerStatusChanged(Dead); tracing::info!(worker_id,exit_code,"worker exited unexpectedly"). No respawn here (P10-A3). Job-failure notification out of scope (JobScheduler does not exist until P13-A3) — leave // TODO(P14) comment at the Dead transition instead. tests/managed_tests.rs: kill spawned child -> Dead observed. cargo test -p anvilml-worker --features mock-hardware exits 0.

description: anvilml-worker: managed.rs respawn cycle after Dead using RespawnPolicy
context: Read crates/anvilml-worker/src/managed.rs and src/keepalive.rs on disk before planning — P902 retrofit (docs/TASKS_PHASE902.md) changed both after P10-A2. See docs/TASKS_PHASE010.md §P10-A3 for the full respawn-cycle spec: spawn() call shape, cfg/device storage decision, route-reuse requirement. Implement the Dead->Respawning->Idle cycle per that spec using tokio::time::sleep (never std::thread::sleep) and should_respawn(&mut crash_count,last_crash). managed_tests.rs: kill subprocess, assert full sequence within timeout. cargo test -p anvilml-worker --features mock-hardware exits 0.

Create handlers/workers.rs restart_worker(State<AppState>,Path<String>): lookup worker by id in WorkerPool; if not found 404; send Shutdown IPC message; force-kill after 5s; respawn. Return 202. Mount POST /v1/workers/:id/restart in build_router. Integration test: restart a worker; GET /v1/workers shows Idle within 30s. cargo test -p anvilml-server --features mock-hardware exits 0.
